summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CryptoVault backend APIs and frontend integration. All critical authentication, wallet, alerts, and transaction endpoints are functional. Frontend pages load correctly with proper routing. TradingChart component fixed and working.

minor_issues.impact: No crypto price data displayed in frontend

integration_issues.issue: 401 Unauthorized errors for /api/auth/me and /api/auth/refresh on first load
Request to /api/crypto fails during app initialization

issues: React Router v7 future flag warnings

passed_tests: JWT token handling with access_token and refresh_token cookies
Price alerts CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Deposit creation with NOWPayments mock integration
Frontend page navigation (Dashboard, Trade, Alerts, Wallet/Deposit)
TradingChart component loading without JavaScript errors
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor improvements needed: 1) Fix /api/crypto endpoint to return actual cryptocurrency data instead of empty array, 2) Handle initial 401 errors gracefully during app startup, 3) Consider updating React Router future flags for v7 compatibility
